'''Lernik De'Yago''' was a male [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] arms merchant.

==Biography==
Before [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], De'Yago, a gunrunner, made occasional deals with members of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] on their base at [[Asher III]].<ref name="Stock Ships" />

Just before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|battle of Hoth]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] found the Asher base and attacked it while De'Yago was there. During the battle, De'Yago's cargo of weapon was appropriated by the Empire and he was never paid for it. De'Yago noticed the illegally-modified [[GX1 short hauler/Legends|Short Hauler]] ''[[Nova Whisper]]'', that the Rebels had been using as a medical transport, and the Rodian merchant stole the ship to escape.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

As the Empire had been close to capture him, De'Yago coded several credit-account access numbers into a subroutine of the [[Navigation computer/Legends|nav computer]], and deleted it from his personal [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]]; thus, should the Empire capture him, they could not find his treasure cover. To access this information, he only had to plot a course to the [[Noquivzor system/Legends|Noquivzor system]] and the ship would recognize the passcode.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

Nevertheless, De'Yago had lost a lot of money and, to recover from his losses, he sold the ''Nova Whisper'' to a starship merchant on the [[Ithorian Herdship]] [[Bazaar (Ithorian Herdship)|''Bazaar'']].<ref name="Stock Ships" />
